certificate.permits_boundary:
permits:
  fs:
    read: ["./CHANGELOG.md"]
    write: ["./CHANGELOG.md"]
  exec: true
  tools: ["nika:edit", "nika:notify"]

# review — effects too dynamic to pin statically:
#   · task `history` uses the shell-string exec form — a program allowlist applies only to the array form; `exec` widened to `true` (rewrite to the array form for a tighter permit)
#   · task `announce` reaches a dynamic URL — `net.http` cannot express 'any host'; add the resolved host(s) before running
